top_signals.title: Thai stock market thriving as surprise beneficiary of AI boom
top_signals.summary: While the country lacks the semiconductor champions of Taiwan or South Korea, investors are increasingly recognizing its role in supplying the infrastructure behind AI.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing
top_signals.summary: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 12% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Airstrike killed senior ISIS commander in Syria, CENTCOM says
top_signals.summary: A senior Islamic State leader was killed by an airstrike last week, Central Command announced on Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Takaichi’s smear video scandal shows Japan’s digital campaign rules are behind curve
top_signals.summary: The issue emerged when an outlet published that one of Takaichi's secretaries met with an individual who participated in a smear campaign against rival candidates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sweden coach Graham Potter says team has to defend better against Japan
top_signals.summary: The Swedes followed up their opening 5-1 win over Tunisia with a loss by the same scoreline against the Netherlands and are third in Group F.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: London councils won’t be able to sue their way to more homes being built
top_signals.summary: Last week I asked the chief executive of one of the country’s largest housing developers to sum up the state of housebuilding in London, and the answer was “dire.” If I’d allowed two words I suspect one of them would have been unprintable. The situation is so disastrous that Sadiq Khan was forced to lower [...]

top_signals.title: HYPE down 22% from record highs: Will spot demand revive the uptrend?
top_signals.summary: HYPE price drops near a key support zone where fading selling pressure collides with shrinking futures market activity. Will the altcoin resume its uptrend above $60?
